title: (Bullish Signal) TME, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on March 24, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that TME's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 133 similar cases, 114 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $22.97 crossed the support line at $26.31 and is trading between $26.31 support and $18.88 support lines. Throughout the month of 02/22/21 - 03/24/21, the price experienced a -7% Downtrend. During the week of 03/17/21 - 03/24/21, the stock fell -17%.

https://preview.redd.it/r89498l7d7p61.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=d1f6488542a8afbcf59538a5d1d10d4616c94da5

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day Moving Average for TME crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 06, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 3 of 5 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 60%.

Following a +4.50% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TME advanced for three days, in 100 of 128 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 114 of 133 cases where TME Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 86%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10161319-tencent-music-entertainment-group-adr-s-tme-23-18-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-march-24-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
